properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I think of all the Lord has done for me, Fully prevailed so I could walk in victory; Since I've touched the cross and felt the pain He bore, Forsaking all my life before, I've set out for Heaven's shore To go with Him all the way, Never to return again to yesterday.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can't turn back on Him, I've turned away from sin; I'll walk with Him everyday, There's just no other way, While bridges behind me burn, Pressing ahead will be my yearn. I've reached the point of no return.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Having put my hand to the plow, I won't look back, Nothing behind could ever match what I now have; The Savior now that I have come to know, Has everything I need to grow, to whom shall I go? Don't ever wanna part, 'Cause it's true that Jesus, He has won my heart.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's a great falling away throughout the land, They fail to see the truth behind The Son of man But in the midst of all the fallen stands a Bride She has adorned herself in white, and for this truth She'll give Her life She goes against the grain, The persecution comes She counts it all as gain.
